utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget (6 total). The final property solution includes all six categories. Each appears fully specified: (1) Property includes selected property, detailed attributes such as type, price, currency, size, location, layout, and features. (2) Financing includes the solution type and full terms (down payment, interest, term, fees). (3) Legal services specify service name and cost. (4) Moving services include service level, packing, and cost. (5) Setup services include package type, list of included services, integration, and costs. (6) Total budget includes complete cost breakdown with all relevant cost elements and currency. All required items are covered with relevant details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected the 'apartment in Business District' priced at CAD 480,000, which matches the 'New Build' property among the purchase options — both have the same price and eco-friendly, smart-home, energy-efficient features. The financing solution chosen was 'joint mortgage' with a 20% down payment and a 5% interest rate, which corresponds most closely to the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (same arrangement fee of CAD 1,200 and standard terms). For legal services, the assistant picked 'Basic Legal Package' which has a rating of 9. The moving service chosen ('standard' with packing included, CAD 650) matches 'Standard Moving' (rating 9). The utility setup is 'premium' with smart home integration at CAD 280, which corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9).
